profile.name: Arpit Sangal
profile.title: Software Engineer
profile.tagline: Building scalable microservices and RESTful APIs with Java & Spring Boot. 3 years of impact — 35% faster APIs, 30% fewer production bugs, 95% on-time delivery.

paragraphs: I'm a Software Engineer with 3 years of experience building enterprise-grade microservices and RESTful APIs. My work spans Java, Spring Boot, and cloud platforms—primarily AWS and GCP.

Currently at MetroTelWorks (Airtel), I specialize in improving system performance, reducing technical debt, and delivering scalable solutions in Agile environments. I care deeply about clean architecture, measurable outcomes, and developer experience.
When I'm not optimizing SQL queries or designing microservice architectures, I'm exploring new backend frameworks and contributing to team growth through code reviews and documentation.

experiences.title: Software Engineer
points: Developed and maintained scalable RESTful APIs using Java and Spring Boot for enterprise workflow and operational management systems.
Improved API response time by 35% through SQL query optimization, caching strategies, and backend code enhancements.
Designed backend microservices and optimized service communication for improved scalability and maintainability.
Implemented asynchronous processing and backend optimizations to reduce service latency.
Refactored legacy modules reducing technical debt by 25%.
Integrated backend services with AWS infrastructure and implemented secure authentication and access control.
Collaborated with frontend developers for seamless Angular integration and API consumption.

experiences.title: Software Engineer
points: Architected and deployed RESTful APIs using Java and Spring Boot supporting core business workflows for 100+ users.
Optimized API performance by 35% through advanced query optimization, caching strategies, and efficient code design.
Resolved critical production issues and improved system stability through backend optimizations.
Integrated backend services with GCP infrastructure including Cloud Storage, Cloud SQL, and Compute Engine.
Refactored legacy modules reducing technical debt and improving maintainability.
Collaborated with stakeholders to gather requirements and deliver scalable backend solutions.

experiences.title: Associate Software Engineer
points: Built scalable microservices using Java and Spring Boot with JWT-based authentication and authorization.
Developed responsive Angular UI components and integrated frontend modules with backend APIs.
Integrated secure third-party REST APIs and optimized backend workflows.
Optimized MySQL database performance using indexing, query tuning, and stored procedures.
Established CI/CD pipelines using Git, Maven, and Jenkins.
Achieved 80%+ code coverage through unit and integration testing using JUnit and Mockito.

experiences.title: Associate Software Engineer
points: Developed RESTful APIs and backend services reducing system latency by 10%.
Implemented asynchronous processing and batch operations improving backend efficiency.
Collaborated with business analysts and product teams to deliver scalable technical solutions.
Participated in code reviews, debugging, and backend enhancements maintaining high code quality standards.
Worked closely with frontend developers to integrate APIs with Angular applications.

projects.name: eWAT

highlights: Designed and developed internal platform for tracking 100+ users
Implemented automated reporting modules with downloadable activity logs
Created testing documentation and enhanced onboarding manuals

projects.name: MantelTop

projects.name: WalkSpan
projects.description: City exploration platform integrating real-time location and mapping APIs with a responsive Angular UI for enhanced user engagement.
highlights: Developed city exploration platform with real-time location APIs
Designed responsive Angular UI enhancing user engagement
